_comment: Pancreatic tumor ABM — Table 1 parameters from Akman Yildiz et al. (2021) scaled to ABM (S=1e5).
_reference: Akman Yildiz T, Kose E, Elliott SL. J Biol Syst. 2021;29(4):799-832. Eqs. 2.1-2.6.
_scaling: S=1e5. Rate constants (day^-1): unchanged. Bilinear coupling (cell day)^-1: x S. Source terms (cells/day): / S. Half-saturation K (cells): / S. Carrying cap: K_ABM = 1/(a*S).
_caps: Carrying capacities for C,P (logistic crowding). K_E,N,H are unused in ODE terms but kept as safety caps in SourceBehavior.
_note_C: mu_c is linear in P (NOT Hill). d_c and b_c are linear in E,N (bilinear). r1*S=34500.
_note_P: lambda_p ~ 0 so PSC almost never dies — grows to K_P driven by tumor C.
_effector_E: Eq 2.3: dE/dt = a_e - b_e*E - c_e*E*C + p_e*H*E/(g_e+H) - delta_e*R*E
_note_E: c_e*E*C and delta_e*R*E are bilinear (no Hill). p_e*H/(g_e+H) is Hill in H. g_e=6.7449e10/S=674490.
_nk_N: Eq 2.4: dN/dt = a_n - b_n*N - c_n*N*C + p_n*H*N/(g_n+H) - delta_n*R*N
_helper_H: Eq 2.5: dH/dt = a_h - b_h*H + p_h*H^2/(g_h+H) - delta_h*R*H
_note_H: delta_h*R*H is bilinear in R. p_h*H/(g_h+H) per cell is Hill in H.
_treg_R: Eq 2.6: dR/dt = a - delta_r*R + a_r*E + b_r*H + p_r*H*R/(g_r+H) - r*N*R
_note_R: a_r*E and b_r*H are absolute source terms handled by SourceBehavior. r*N*R is bilinear in N. p_r*H/(g_r+H) is per-cell proliferation (Hill in H).
